headline: How The Merck (MRK) Investment Story Is Shifting With Terns Deal And Oncology Updates
summary: Merck’s analyst fair value estimate has shifted from US$124.88 to US$129.74 per share, providing an updated reference point for where some on the Street think the stock should trade. That change comes alongside recent research on the Terns deal, oncology pipeline updates, and fresh coverage initiations. Together, these developments help frame how analysts are weighing growth potential against execution and competitive risks. As you read on, you will see what is driving this evolving story and...

summary: The kernicterus market is experiencing growth, fueled by an increase in neonatal jaundice cases, particularly among preterm infants.
